temporal_description: A man with a mustache, wearing a white shirt and dark tie, is seated and looking downward, his head slightly tilted. The scene shifts to another man in a dark suit and glasses, also seated and looking down, with a telephone receiver being placed near his ear. A woman with short brown hair, wearing a dark-colored top, is seated and looking down at a piece of paper, with a window behind her. All individuals are seated, and their postures suggest they are focused on tasks or listening intently.
